content_outline: Is Your Landlord Breaking the Law?
What Landlords Can and Cannot Deduct from Your Deposit

key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 30 days and provide an itemized deduction list
Normal wear and tear, pre-existing damage, and routine cleaning are not legally deductible in most jurisdictions
A formal demand letter citing state statutes often forces immediate payment without going to court
Deposits-Back.com generates a legally formatted security deposit demand letter for $19.99 in 60 seconds with no signup or subscription required
